description:
Advances: all 9 subjects (api_boundary tier).
Deliverable: add realized_by.api_boundary: MFA list to each subject's spec-meta
block, pointing at the real public functions that realize it. Draft with
`mix spec.suggest_binding`, then verify each MFA resolves.
Verification: mix spec.suggest_binding reports no subjects-without-binding;
mix spec.check has zero branch_guard_dangling_binding findings; mix spec.validate still 0 errors.
Out of Scope (files): lib/**, test/** (binding points AT code; does not change it).
Allowed touches: .spec/specs/*.spec.md (spec-meta realized_by block only).
Out of Scope (intent): do NOT opt into implementation/expanded_behavior/use/
typespecs tiers; do NOT wire test tags or coverage (phase3/phase4 follow-on).
Merge gate: mix spec.check (zero dangling) && mix spec.validate (0 errors) && mix test

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED

Authored realized_by.api_boundary MFA bindings for all 9 subjects in their spec-meta blocks. Each entry points at a real, loadable public module (verified via Code.ensure_loaded); corrected the suggester's MutagenEx.Cli -> MutagenEx.CLL... actually MutagenEx.CLI to match the real module name. Only the api_boundary tier was opted into — no implementation/expanded_behavior/use/typespecs, no test tags or coverage. Regenerated .spec/state.json.

Bindings authored:
- mutagen.ast: MutagenEx.Ast
- mutagen.cli: Mix.Tasks.Mutagen, MutagenEx.CLI, MutagenEx.Config, MutagenEx.Types
- mutagen.coverage: MutagenEx.CoverageRunner, MutagenEx.AstCache
- mutagen.json_schema: MutagenEx.JsonReporter, MutagenEx.JsonStreamer
- mutagen.mutation_enumeration: MutagenEx.MutationEnumerator, MutagenEx.Mutators.Dispatch
- mutagen.mutation_pipeline: Baseline, BeamCache, MutationRunner, MutationRunner.MutationLoop, Telemetry, Progress, Application, Test.CodeServer, Test.CodeServerFacade, Mix.Tasks.Mutagen
- mutagen.mutators: Mutators + 10 mutator modules (Arith, Compare, Boolean, Literal, WithSwap, CaseDrop, Pipeline, ResultTuple, ElseRemoval, GuardDrop)
- mutagen.scope_resolution: MutagenEx.ScopeResolver
- mutagen.test_selection: MutagenEx.TestSelector

Merge gate results:
- mix spec.suggest_binding -> 'All subjects have realized_by bindings.' (no subjects-without-binding)
- mix spec.check -> 0 branch_guard_dangling_binding findings
- mix spec.validate -> status=pass errors=0 warnings=0
- mix test -> 640 tests, 0 failures (19 excluded)

Note: mix spec.check reports status=fail with 2 verification_command_failed errors (mutagen.ast grep, mutagen.cli archive_install test). Both are PRE-EXISTING on the clean branch base (confirmed by stashing my changes and re-running check) and are out of scope for this ticket (binding-points-AT-code; prose verification commands untouched). They are NOT branch_guard_dangling_binding findings, which is the gate this ticket targets — that count is 0.

Files touched: .spec/specs/{ast,cli,coverage,json_schema,mutation_enumeration,mutation_pipeline,mutators,scope_resolution,test_selection}.spec.md (spec-meta realized_by block only) + .spec/state.json. No lib/** or test/** changes. Committed as 9ccde38.

NOTE (correction to prior comment): the suggester emitted MutagenEx.Cli; the real, loadable module is MutagenEx.CLI (lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex defines defmodule MutagenEx.CLI). The cli spec binds MutagenEx.CLI. Disregard the garbled 'CLL' fragment in the IMPLEMENTED comment.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: 0eb050fa-440a-426e-9f51-bfd4d1ee50de
Log: ~/.claude-remembers/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/0eb050fa-440a-426e-9f51-bfd4d1ee50de.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 10 (9 .spec.md + .spec/state.json)
- Files outside Allowed globs: 0 (state.json exempt as generated index)
- Non-realized_by changes inside touched spec files: 0 — diff is purely additive 'realized_by.api_boundary' blocks; no prose, requirements, scenarios, verification entries, ids, surface, or decisions altered; no other tiers (implementation/expanded_behavior/use/typespecs) opted in; no test tags/coverage added.

Semantic checks:
- spec.suggest_binding: 0 subjects-without-binding ('All subjects have realized_by bindings.')
- spec.check branch_guard_dangling_binding: 0. Other findings: 2 verification_command_failed (mutagen.ast grep, mutagen.cli archive_install test) — both PRE-EXISTING (independently confirmed: checked out base ref 0ea01e8 spec files into worktree, re-ran spec.check, same 2 findings appeared with 0 dangling; restored ticket files after). NOT introduced by this ticket. This ticket introduced ZERO new findings.
- spec.validate: 0 errors (status=pass, 0 warnings)
- mix test: 640 tests, 0 failures (19 excluded) — GREEN
- Per-subject binding resolves to a real module (Code.ensure_loaded? on every authored MFA):
  - mutagen.ast: MutagenEx.Ast -> yes
  - mutagen.cli: Mix.Tasks.Mutagen, MutagenEx.CLI, MutagenEx.Config, MutagenEx.Types -> yes (CLI is real MutagenEx.CLI at lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex; no lowercase Cli typo in any spec)
  - mutagen.coverage: MutagenEx.CoverageRunner, MutagenEx.AstCache -> yes
  - mutagen.json_schema: MutagenEx.JsonReporter, MutagenEx.JsonStreamer -> yes
  - mutagen.mutation_enumeration: MutagenEx.MutationEnumerator, MutagenEx.Mutators.Dispatch -> yes
  - mutagen.mutation_pipeline: Baseline, BeamCache, MutationRunner, MutationRunner.MutationLoop, Telemetry, Progress, Application, Test.CodeServer, Test.CodeServerFacade, Mix.Tasks.Mutagen (all MutagenEx.*) -> yes (10/10)
  - mutagen.mutators: MutagenEx.Mutators + 10 mutators (Arith, Compare, Boolean, Literal, WithSwap, CaseDrop, Pipeline, ResultTuple, ElseRemoval, GuardDrop) -> yes (11/11)
  - mutagen.scope_resolution: MutagenEx.ScopeResolver -> yes
  - mutagen.test_selection: MutagenEx.TestSelector -> yes
- Intent-level scope concerns: none — no lib/** or test/** edits; only api_boundary tier opted in.
- Project verification (merge gate: dangling=0 && validate 0 err && test green): PASS

Verdict: PASS

Notes (advisory only): The 2 verification_command_failed findings make 'mix spec.check' report status=fail, but they are pre-existing prose-verification failures (mutagen.ast grep exits 1 on empty match; mutagen.cli archive_install test is RED on the known telemetry.app archive-packaging defect). Both exist on the base ref independent of this ticket and are out of scope (this ticket only adds spec-meta realized_by blocks). The gate signal for this ticket — branch_guard_dangling_binding — is 0.

AUDIT: APPROVE
Session: 0eb050fa-440a-426e-9f51-bfd4d1ee50de
Log: ~/.claude-remembers/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/0eb050fa-440a-426e-9f51-bfd4d1ee50de.jsonl

Reasoning: Re-ran the gate cold on HEAD: spec.suggest_binding = 'All subjects have realized_by bindings' (0 unbound); spec.validate = status=pass errors=0 warnings=0; spec.check = status=fail errors=2 but ZERO branch_guard_dangling_binding findings. The 2 errors are both verification_command_failed (mutagen.ast grep, mutagen.cli archive_install test). I proved they are pre-existing: checked out the base ref (0ea01e8) spec files into the worktree, re-ran spec.check, and got the SAME 2 verification_command_failed errors with 0 dangling — this ticket introduced ZERO new findings; restored ticket files after. The actual gate (dangling=0) is met. mix test ran green on a fixed seed 0 (640 tests, 0 failures, 19 excluded) across two runs; one earlier default-seed run showed a single flake (in-process pipeline suite is timing/telemetry-sensitive), but the diff touches zero lib/test code so it cannot be a regression.

Binding fidelity (skeptical pass): all 33 authored modules return Code.ensure_loaded? = true; the lowercase typo MutagenEx.Cli is NOT loadable, confirming the cli spec binds the real MutagenEx.CLI (lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex), not the garbled fragment from the IMPLEMENTED comment. The two 'suspect' lists are NOT padding: mutation_pipeline's 10 modules map 1:1 to its 10 declared surface files (baseline, beam_cache, mutation_runner, mutation_loop, telemetry, progress, application, test/code_server, test/code_server_facade, mix/tasks/mutagen), and mutators' 11 = the catalog module + the 10 v1 mutators the spec enumerates. Boundary discipline is correct, not a grab-bag: Mutators.Dispatch lives under mutators/ but is bound to mutation_enumeration (per that subject's surface), and internal sub-modules (JsonReporter.Sanitizer/Report, ScopeResolver.Scope, MutationEnumerator.Site) are correctly excluded from the public boundary.

Scope: diff is exactly 9 .spec.md files (purely additive realized_by.api_boundary blocks — no prose/requirements/scenarios/verification/surface/decisions/other-tier changes) plus generated .spec/state.json (exempt). No lib/** or test/** edits. Intent honored: only api_boundary tier opted in.

title: phase2: author realized_by.api_boundary bindings for all subjects
